name: Secret Keeper

recommended.why: Fury of Blood greatly increases HP and Damage Reduction, allowing Secret Keeper to absorb more damage while protecting allies with his shields and defensive abilities.

alternative.why: Knight Gear provides additional HP and Skill Damage, making it a reasonable alternative once survivability is no longer an issue and stronger gear becomes available.

investment.why: Secret Keeper is an excellent frontline tank during the early and mid game thanks to his shields, crowd control and defensive utility. However, he is eventually replaced by Mythic tanks such as Adjudicator or Rose Princess, making him a temporary investment rather than a long-term priority.

description: Secret Keeper is a Legendary League tank specializing in shielding allies, absorbing damage and controlling the battlefield. His strong defensive toolkit makes him one of the best beginner tanks for League teams, providing reliable frontline protection until Mythic heroes become available.
